NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZANCANELLI, GINA
PURSUANT TO STIP OF THE PARTIES, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON NOV 14,1994 AGAINST PLFT//CROSS-DEFTS GINA ZANCANELLI AND
ORDERED THAT THE ACTION AND CROSS-ACTION FILED HEREIN ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZANCANELLI, GINA AGELOPOULOS, MIKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BENEFIELD, CARL  DBA :GOLDEN GATE HEIGHTS APTS. BENEFIELD, SHIRLEY DBA GOLDEN GATE HEIGHTS APTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
